task_description: Consensus planning for a sample-HWP editable HTML conversion harness, using the deep-interview spec as source of truth.
notes: Planner -> Architect -> Critic loop converged with approval.
PRD and test spec now satisfy the ralph planning gate.
decision: Reference-first hybrid harness with canonical sample manifest, per-run artifact retention, and single-entry execution command.

architect_summary.antithesis: Parser-first IR is architecturally cleaner and avoids locking into a sample-specific DOM/fit-layer.
architect_summary.tradeoff: Fastest path to sample fidelity versus long-term generalizable structure.
architect_summary.synthesis: Keep reference-first for milestone 1, but force canonical manifest/run contracts so parser-first can replace the generator later.

improvements: resolved open questions trimmed to post-milestone decisions

draft_summary: Revising around architect+critic feedback: treat reference runtime reuse vs rebuild as the primary architectural decision.
